title: sabbatismos #4520
definition:
1) a keeping sabbath
 2) the blessed rest from toils and troubles looked for in the
    age to come by the true worshippers of God and true Christians
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a keeping sabbath
 2) the blessed rest from toils and troubles looked for in the
    age to come by the true worshippers of God and true Christians

    NASB:  a sabbath rest:
